SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class QRcodeScanner

java.lang.Object
server.controller.QRcodeScanner
public class QRcodeScanner extends Object
Utility class for generating and scanning QR codes. Uses the Google ZXing library for encoding and decoding operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    QRcodeScanner()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static String
    decode(BufferedImage bufferedImage)
    Helper method to decode a QR code from a BufferedImage.
    static String
    generateQRCodeBase64(String text)
    Generates a QR Code with a default size of 200x200.
    static String
    generateQRCodeBase64(String text, int width, int height)
    Generates a QR Code with custom width and height.
    static String
    scanQRCodeFromBase64(String base64Image)
    Scans and decodes a QR code from a Base64 encoded string.
    static String

    Scans and decodes a QR code directly from a file path.

  • Constructor Details

    • QRcodeScanner

      public QRcodeScanner()

  • Method Details

    • generateQRCodeBase64

      public static String generateQRCodeBase64(String text)
      Generates a QR Code with a default size of 200x200. This matches your email function call: generateQRCodeBase64(String)
      Parameters:
      text - The text to encode in the QR code.
      Returns:
      The Base64 string representation of the generated QR code.

    • generateQRCodeBase64

      public static String generateQRCodeBase64(String text, int width, int height)
      Generates a QR Code with custom width and height. Encodes the text into a QR code, converts it to a PNG image, and returns the Base64 string.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to encode.
      width - The width of the QR code image.
      height - The height of the QR code image.
      Returns:
      The Base64 string representation of the QR code, or null if generation fails.

    • decode

      private static String decode(BufferedImage bufferedImage) throws com.google.zxing.NotFoundException
      Helper method to decode a QR code from a BufferedImage. Uses ZXing MultiFormatReader to interpret the barcode data.
      Parameters:
      bufferedImage - The image containing the QR code.
      Returns:
      The text encoded in the QR code.
      Throws:
      com.google.zxing.NotFoundException - If no QR code is found in the image.

    • scanQRCodeFromBase64

      public static String scanQRCodeFromBase64(String base64Image)
      Scans and decodes a QR code from a Base64 encoded string. Handles standard Base64 strings and Data URI schemes (stripping "data:image/...;base64,").
      Parameters:
      base64Image - The Base64 string of the image.
      Returns:
      The decoded text from the QR code, or null if decoding fails.

    • scanQRCodeFromFile

      public static String scanQRCodeFromFile(String filePath)
      Scans and decodes a QR code directly from a file path.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute or relative path to the image file.
      Returns:
      The decoded text from the QR code, or null if decoding fails.
